title: stelis consors
intro: Stelis consors is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis consors include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and help with wound healing, among other uses. Herbal preparations of Stelis consors typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds for consumption as teas or remedies.
